phases.name: MVP Perception Pipeline
phases.goal: Run prebuilt EgoLanes model on sample images and output lane detections
success_criteria: EgoLanes model downloads and loads successfully
CLI can run inference on sample images
Outputs are saved to disk in numpy format

phases.name: Simulation Environment
phases.goal: Provide Docker environment and simulation scripts for CARLA/SODA.Sim
success_criteria: Docker compose can orchestrate simulation services
EgoLanes client can connect to simulation

phases.name: Integration Testing
phases.goal: Test end-to-end simulation with EgoLanes inference
success_criteria: CARLA client spawns vehicle and captures frames
Real-time inference runs on simulation frames
